description: An agronomist wants a yield forecast for a corn field based on current crop health imagery and weather data.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest satellite imagery and historical yield data for the field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary historical and current data.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the long-range weather forecast for the remainder of the growing season.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the forecast until the typical harvest date.

nodes.task_description: Run a machine learning yield prediction model using the collected data.

expected_outcome.value: The model predicts an average yield of 210 bushels per acre for the field.

nodes.task_description: Generate a yield forecast map showing the predicted yield variation across the field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a map visualizing the yield predictions.
